planned_queries.label: baseline_condition_intervention
planned_queries.term: ("Advanced or metastatic non-small cell lung cancer"[Title/Abstract] OR "non-small cell lung cancer"[Title/Abstract] OR "non small cell lung cancer"[Title/Abstract] OR "nsclc"[Title/Abstract] OR "lung cancer"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("PD-1/PD-L1 immune checkpoint inhibitor"[Title/Abstract] OR "pd-1"[Title/Abstract] OR "pd-l1"[Title/Abstract] OR "checkpoint inhibitor"[Title/Abstract] OR "pembrolizumab"[Title/Abstract] OR "nivolumab"[Title/Abstract]) AND (clinical trial[Publication Type] OR "clinical trial"[Title/Abstract] OR phase[Title/Abstract])

planned_queries.label: safety_monitoring
planned_queries.term: ("PD-1/PD-L1 immune checkpoint inhibitor"[Title/Abstract] OR "pd-1"[Title/Abstract] OR "pd-l1"[Title/Abstract] OR "checkpoint inhibitor"[Title/Abstract] OR "pembrolizumab"[Title/Abstract] OR "nivolumab"[Title/Abstract]) AND (safety[Title/Abstract] OR adverse events[Title/Abstract]) AND (clinical trial[Publication Type] OR "clinical trial"[Title/Abstract] OR phase[Title/Abstract])

query_concepts.condition: Advanced or metastatic non-small cell lung cancer

limitations: PubMed retrieval returns literature candidates, not proof that a draft protocol is scientifically correct.
This prototype stores article metadata only and does not perform full-text review.
Literature records may be broad matches and require human expert screening.
